creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Jason E. Hale from comment #1)

As an alternative to updating the main port to an unreleased version and given the amount time between stable releases, might a librecad-devel port provide some user value?

It might also help to QA and/or serve as a heads-up for potential issues when updating the main (stable) port as well. 

Perhaps Maciej would also be interested in (co)maintaining?
